query: SELECT bookTitle, authorName, coverImageUrl, s3CoverUrl FROM book_profiles WHERE coverImageUrl IS NULL OR coverImageUrl = '' OR LENGTH(coverImageUrl) < 20 ORDER BY bookTitle LIMIT 20;
